---
title: 'BridgeQG Vade Mecum'
---

```mindmap-graph
Vade Mecum {shape: circle} -> Violation and Deformation of Relativistic Symmetries {url:/doc/LIV_DSR.html}
Vade Mecum {shape: circle} -> In-vacuo dispersion {url:/doc/Invacuo_dispersion.html}
Vade Mecum {shape: circle} -> Second level topics

Second level topics -> Quantum Gravity Scale {url:/doc/QGscale.html}
Second level topics -> Time delays {url:/doc/time_delay.html}
```
